point_in_time_rule: strictly before match date; same-day updates batched

features.elo_side_gap: chronologically reconstructed Elo gap divided by 400
features.long_attack: opponent-adjusted scoring residual, 730-day half-life, eight-match shrinkage prior
features.opponent_defense_weakness: opponent-adjusted concession residual with identical shrinkage
features.home_non_neutral: one only for non-neutral listed-home team
features.confederation: not included because canonical historical confederation metadata is unavailable

margin_handling: log1p absolute margin capped at 2.0 for diagnostics; raw capped goal residuals drive attack/defense histories
